Breakpoints._Preset: Normal long-rebirth PUSH (auto-installed). One long run to build max stats, then kill the titan you're stuck on (T4/T6...). RebirthTime -1 = no auto-rebirth (you rebirth manually after the kill). Builds Basic/Advanced Training + Time Machine + best Augment for power; gear auto-optimizes for Adventure (max Power/Toughness) + a Respawn item. Requires Manage Gear + Manage Energy/Magic ON.
Breakpoints._Injector: Not a challenge block - this is a deliberate single long rebirth. Turn Auto Rebirth OFF (or leave it; -1 overrides). Adventure: Combat ON, idle, target your best push zone.
